inputCardDescription: Encrypt typed text or choose a local file. File contents stay in this browser.
textInputPlaceholder: Paste the message you want to encrypt...
fileInputDescription: A selected file is encrypted instead of the text box.
keyCardDescription: Use a password with PBKDF2 for portable output, or provide an exact-length raw AES key.
optionsCardDescription: AES-GCM is the safest default because it authenticates the encrypted data.
resultCardDescription: The JSON includes the AES mode, key derivation settings, salt, IV, and ciphertext. It never includes your password or raw key.
emptyResultDescription: Enter text or choose a file, set a key, then run encryption.
gcmNote: AES-GCM adds authentication, so wrong keys or tampered ciphertext fail during decryption.
cbcWarning: AES-CBC does not authenticate ciphertext. Use it only when compatibility requires it.
ctrWarning: AES-CTR does not authenticate ciphertext. Use it only when compatibility requires it.
validationInputRequired: Enter text or choose a file.
validationRawKeyInvalid: The raw key must be valid hex and match the selected key length.
validationIterationsInvalid: Use a whole PBKDF2 iteration count between 1,000 and 10,000,000.
